parameters.content:
{{ ... }} templating expression isn’t valid JavaScript inside n8n’s interpolation engine.
n8n’s $json syntax doesn’t support inline backticks, arrow functions, or .map() directly inside the same expression string.
We’ll let n8n build the prompt string before the HTTP node — using a Set node or Function node — and then send clean JSON to Ollama.

These APIs don't "create" entirely new images from scratch (like AI image generators such as DALL-E); instead, they overlay custom text on pre-existing meme templates (e.g., "Distracted Boyfriend" or "Drake Hotline Bling")
Rapid API doesnt allow post requests for free.
We can use nano banana to generate images instead of using readymade templates but for now we will use image flip
